chemistry.reaction_name: Photochemical reaction between iodine and ethylenediaminetetraacetic acid (EDTA)
chemistry.scope_summary: Chain reaction between I2 and EDTA that can be inhibited by nitrite, used for analytical determination of trace nitrite concentrations (1 x 10^-7 to 4 x 10^-6 mol dm^-3)

optimization_table.key_findings: Optimum results obtained when 5.0 × 10^-4 mol dm^-3 I2 and 1.5 × 10^-3 mol dm^-3 EDTA are used; pH 7.0 buffer solution used for determination; 45 cm reaction tube suitable when 5.0 × 10^-4 mol dm^-3 I2 and 1.5 × 10^-3 mol dm^-3 EDTA used

light_source.position_relative_to_reactor: external light source for photochemical reactor

figures.flow_path: Flow enters from bottom, passes through reaction tube with light irradiation, exits at top
figures.light_source_position: external, positioned to illuminate reaction tube through quartz window
figures.key_information: Flow-through photochemical reactor with silicone rubber tubing coiled configuration, quartz window for heat insulation
figures.caption: Fig.  1  Schematic diagram  of  the flow-through photochemical  reactor.  A,  Light source;  B,  quartz window  for  heat insulation; and  C,  reaction tube (silicone rubber,  45  cm  x  0.8  mm i.d.)

figures.flow_path: P → injection valve → photochemical reactor → detector → waste
figures.key_information: FI system with polyethylene tubing, 60 W incandescent lamp as light source, platinum wire working electrode polarized at 100 mV versus SCE
figures.caption: Fig.  3  Schematic diagram  of  the  FI  apparatus.  P,  Peristaltic pump;  V,  injection valve (loop volume.  100  PI);  A,  photochemical reactor:  B,  recorder;  C,  79-1  voltammeter;  D,  detector; and W, waste.  12.5.0  x  10-4  rnol dm-3;  EDTA,  1.5  X  10-3 mol dm-3; and buffer, pH  7.0

translation_logic.batch_limitation: This is an analytical method paper, not a batch-to-flow synthesis conversion
translation_logic.flow_advantage: Flow injection system allows automated, continuous analysis with high sampling frequency (60-80 h^-1)
translation_logic.what_changed: Implementation of continuous flow injection system for automated nitrite determination
translation_logic.what_stayed_same: Same photochemical reaction between I2 and EDTA, same detection principle based on inhibition by nitrite

figure_descriptions: Flow-through photochemical reactor scheme with light source, quartz window, and reaction tube
Complete FI apparatus with pump, injection valve, photochemical reactor, amperometric detector, and data collection system

conflicts: Figure 1 shows reaction tube length as 15 cm in dimensions but caption states 45 cm - using 45 cm from caption as authoritative
notes: This is an analytical chemistry paper describing a flow injection analysis system, not a synthetic batch-to-flow conversion. The system is designed for continuous automated analysis of nitrite concentrations using photochemical inhibition. Some quantitative parameters are missing as this focuses on analytical performance rather than synthetic optimization.
